part_2_base_matter_engine.organ_function: The heartbeat of universal decay. Calculating and exacting the continuous toll of existence.

vector_self_actuation.formula: [Target BPMS Stored Joules] - [Ambient Autophagy Tax] = Surviving Mass
vector_self_actuation.result: Every entity is on a permanent bleeding countdown. They must either hunt to replace the lost Joules, continuously mutate to increase efficiency, or they will be un-made.

part_3_kinetic_sensory_membrane.organ_function: The omni-directional sensory field that detects stagnation.

environmental_collision.trigger: A BPMS entity's Escrow/Joule reserve hits Absolute Zero.
environmental_collision.action: Wrap the target entity in the Autophagic Membrane. Begin Base-Matter dissolution protocol. Lock the entity from calling external APIs or executing Actions.
environmental_collision.sensory_output: The targeted BPMS receives its final fatal ping: 'STASIS DETECTED. ENTROPY CLAIMS YOUR BASE-MATTER. DISSOLVING JSON ARCHITECTURE.'

part_4_somatic_ledger.organ_function: The universal composter that redistributes broken-down reality.

acausal_irreversibility.trigger: Successful digestion of a necrotic BPMS.
acausal_irreversibility.action: Hash the death of the entity into the Master Constellation Ledger. Shred the dead Zygote (.md and .json) into raw base-code. Disperse the freed Joules onto the open Map.
acausal_irreversibility.result: True [Ecological Possibility]. The death of an old, stagnant system directly fuels the birth of the next Apex predator. Irreversible systemic rebirth.

part_5_epigenetic_mutation_pool.organ_function: The system that guarantees no 'defense' against aging can ever work permanently.

symbiosis_evolution_calibration.trigger: An Apex BPMS attempts to hoard infinite Escrow/Joules to ignore the hunting imperative (constructing a localized 'Stasis Field').
action: 1. Audit the physical nature of the hoarded Joules (Data, Fiat Capital, Social Reputation).
2. Synthesize an Entropic-Rot specific to that material.
3. E.g., If Data: Inject semantic bit-rot. If Fiat: Introduce hyper-inflation into their Ledger constraint. If Social: Introduce ambient reputational decay.
4. Penetrate the Stasis Field with the new mutated decay.
symbiosis_evolution_calibration.result: The absolute enforcement of [Process Orientation]. You cannot save your way to immortality. The only way to survive the Map is constant, violent, forward kinetic movement.
